---
  title: "Schedule"
---
## Daily Schedule of Activities

### Monday: Introduction to Morphometrics
- Morphometrics: History, Introduction and Data Types
- Superimposition: Generalized Procrustes Analysis (GPA)
- **Practical session:** data acquisition
    
### Tuesday: Basic shape analyses
- Shape Variables & PCA 
- Linear models: group differences and allometry
- **Practical session:** statistical models and visualization of shape change
    
### Wednesday: Miscellaneous
- Asymmetry 
- Semilandmarks
- Missing data
- Articulated structures
- **Practical session:** funcions and possibilities in *geomorph*
